hero.subtitle: Sahbi organizes group meetups in Marrakech's best restaurants. No swiping. We meet first, we chat later.
hero.headline: This app doesn't let you chat first.
hero.lead: Sahbi brings small groups of like-minded people together for real meetups in Marrakech and Casablanca.
hero.bullet3: Just real people, real places, and real moments.
hero.betaCaption: Beta launching soon in Morocco. The first 100 selected members get free access.

concept.title: The Concept
concept.subtitle: The anti-swipe that puts humans first
concept.promise: No more endless virtual conversations. We meet first, we chat later.
concept.experience: Algorithm-curated groups (interests, age) gather in partner restaurants to share a meal.
concept.meaning: Sahbi means "my friend" or "my companion" in Arabic.

features.title: The Sahbi Experience
features.subtitle: Before, during and after the meetup

onboarding.title: Profile & Onboarding
onboarding.desc: Photos, bio, age, profession and interests for personalized matching.

booking.title: Intuitive booking
booking.desc: City, cuisine type, price range. Venue confirmed 24h before, participants stay secret.

unlock.title: The Unlock
unlock.desc: Presence detected (geolocation or QR). Profiles revealed after the meal.

chat.title: Group chat
chat.desc: Opens automatically after the meal to keep exchanging, share photos or plan another outing.

trust.title: Trust Score
trust.desc: 1-5 rating: punctuality, politeness, conviviality. A quality community.

waitlist.title: Marrakech Waitlist
waitlist.subtitle: The first 100 sign-ups get free access to the app during the beta.
waitlist.success: Thank you! You're among the first 100. We'll contact you for the beta.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Sahbi ("we", "our") is committed to protecting your personal data. This policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information.

collect.title: Data collected
items: Photos, bio, age, profession and interests

share.title: Data sharing
share.text: We never sell your data to third parties. Information shared with partner restaurants is limited to what is strictly necessary for reservation.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.text: You can request access, rectification or deletion of your data at any time. Contact us to exercise your rights.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: By using Sahbi, you accept these terms. Please read them carefully.

1.title: 1. Acceptance of terms
1.content: Access to and use of Sahbi implies full acceptance of these terms. If you do not accept them, please do not use our service.

2.title: 2. Service description
2.content: Sahbi is a group meetup app that organizes meals in partner restaurants. The service includes matching, booking and post-meetup communication features.

3.title: 3. Registration and account
3.content: To use Sahbi, you must create an account with accurate information. You are responsible for keeping your credentials confidential. Accounts are personal and non-transferable.

4.title: 4. Behavior and respect
4.content: You agree to behave respectfully during meetups. Any inappropriate behavior, harassment or lack of punctuality may result in suspension or exclusion from the service.

5.title: 5. Subscription and payment
5.content: Sahbi Day (59 MAD/month) and Sahbi Night (199 MAD/month) subscriptions give access to meetups. The meal is paid directly at the restaurant. Subscriptions renew automatically unless cancelled.

6.title: 6. Cancellation and refund
6.content: Cancellations must be made at least 24h before the event. Repeated no-shows may result in account suspension. Refunds are processed according to our policy.

7.title: 7. Modifications
7.content: Sahbi reserves the right to modify these terms. Users will be informed of significant changes. Continued use after modification constitutes acceptance.

countdown.title: Launch in
countdown.subtitle: Sahbi mobile app arrives March 2026 in Marrakech

slides.title: The Sahbi experience in pictures
slides.brunchDesc: 5 strangers around a table for a convivial moment
slides.dinnerDesc: Meet new people in the best restaurants

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Sahbi
faq.a1: Sahbi organizes group meetups in partner restaurants. You book a slot (Sunday brunch or weekend evening), and our algorithm matches you with 5-6 people sharing your interests. The venue is revealed 24h before, participants stay secret until the end of the meal.
faq.q2: What's the difference between Sahbi Day and Sahbi Night?
faq.a2: Sahbi Day (59 MAD/month) gives access to Sunday brunches with 5 people. Sahbi Night (199 MAD/month) includes everything in Sahbi Day plus exclusive evenings: Girls Night Out on Friday and Single & Ready on Saturday with groups of 6.
faq.a3: Our matching algorithm considers your interests, age and preferences to form balanced groups and foster natural exchanges. Diversity and parity are important criteria.
faq.q4: Is the meal included in the subscription?
faq.a4: No. The subscription covers matching and service access. You pay for your meal directly at the partner restaurant according to the menu.
faq.q5: What if I can't make it?
faq.a5: You can cancel up to 24h before the event from the app. Repeated cancellations or unexcused absences may affect your Trust Score and service access.
faq.q6: Is Sahbi available in other cities?
faq.a6: Marrakech is our pilot city for the March 2026 launch. Expansion to other Moroccan cities is planned based on launch success.

feedback.title: Your opinion matters
feedback.subtitle: Share your ideas and suggestions to improve Sahbi
feedback.name: Your name
feedback.success: Thank you for your feedback! We take every suggestion into account.
